showcases.title: Bible Verse Video Collection
showcases.description: Experience God's Word through AI-generated videos with beautiful visuals and peaceful atmospheres.

items.title: Psalm 23:1-3 (NIV)
items.description: The Lord is my shepherd, I lack nothing. He makes me lie down in green pastures...

items.title: 1 John 3:1 (NIV)
items.description: See what great love the Father has lavished on us, that we should be called children of God!

items.title: Jeremiah 29:11 (NIV)
items.description: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you...

items.title: Isaiah 40:31 (NIV)
items.description: But those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength. They will soar on wings like eagles...
